productDisplayName: Carrera Men Strap dial Orange Watches
description: carrera has been in the watch industry for more than five decades and they have proven themselves as  masters in the art of  creating high quality timepieces.  The new range of carrera watches are a fresh take on their classic drivers& rsquo and racers& rsquo watch models and perfect for urban wear.Case diameter: 34 mm Case thickness: 11 mm Dial shape: OctagonStainless steel case, with black rubber strap with brand inscription on the inner side for enhanced durability, comfort and styleTang clasp with brand inscription Fixed stainless steel bezel for added durability and styleOrange busy dial with metallic numbers in Roman and metallic handsMetallic crown to adjust time/date/dayWater resistant at 100 meters, making it suitable for scuba diving 3.4 cm
